name: Slack Mirror
description: Mirror your Slack identity invisibly. Forward @mentions to Telegram/WhatsApp/Discord. Post AS YOU on command. No Slack bot footprint.
author: Merlin Rabens

sessionConfig.description: JSON dump of localStorage.localConfig_v2 from your Slack browser tab. Contains all your workspace tokens (xoxc-...). Use the included bookmarklet to scrape it.

dCookie.description: Slack 'd' cookie value (xoxd-...) from app.slack.com. Shared across all your workspaces.

notifyTarget.description: Where to send notifications when you're @mentioned in Slack

channel.description: Which OpenClaw channel to forward to

chatId.description: Target chat/user ID in that channel

includeOwnMessages.description: Forward your own self-DMs and self-mentions (useful for testing)

keywordHighlights.description: Additional keywords (besides your @-mentions) that trigger notifications

muteChannels.description: Channel IDs or names to mute (no notifications even on @-mention)

posterEnabled.description: Enable AS-YOU posting via xoxp tokens. Requires installing a Slack App with user scopes per workspace and providing user tokens.

userTokens.description: Optional: per-workspace User OAuth tokens (xoxp-...) for AS-YOU posting. Keys are team_domain.

sessionConfig.label: Slack Browser Session Config
sessionConfig.help: Use the bookmarklet (browser-extension/scrape-bookmarklet.js) on a Slack tab to capture this. Contains all your workspace tokens.

notifyTarget.label: Notification Target
notifyTarget.help: Channel + chat ID where mention notifications get forwarded

posterEnabled.label: Enable AS-YOU posting
posterEnabled.help: Allow OpenClaw to post in Slack as you when commanded via your notification channel
